recent_form_summary: Excellent on grass recently: Hertogenbosch semifinal run, then played Fery and Mensik at Queen's Club; 8th seed at Mallorca.
stat_trend_summary: Hit 12 aces in his Hertogenbosch QF win and totaled 22 aces across his first three matches there (~7.3/match), well above this 6.5 line.
opponent_factor_summary: Borges leads the H2H 2-0 (on hard/clay, not grass) but isn't an elite returner -- largely neutral-to-favorable for ace production.
notes: Grass-season ace rate (~7.3/match) sits comfortably above the 6.5 line, supporting a favorable lean, though recency data beyond Hertogenbosch was limited.
